pr.title: #1 on leaderboard: val_bpb=1.1574 — Int6 + MLP 3x + selective precision + optimized long-context training

output.summary: Int6 quantization with fp16 embeddings/late keys frees space for an MLP-1536 model trained at 2048 while sliding-window eval uses stride 256.
techniques: int6 per-row quantization with fp16 tied embedding and late-K passthrough
MLP expansion to 1536 hidden units within 21.8M params
train@2048 plus sliding-window eval with stride 256
